title: scutellaria boissieri
intro: Scutellaria boissieri, also known as the Turkish skullcap, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and neuroprotective effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria boissieri include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting liver and kidney function. It can be consumed as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs for enhanced benefits.
